title: Glass Rose Study
description: A three-image continuity series about the same transparent glass rose moving through studio, rain window, and museum case settings.
creative_direction: Series focused on material consistency: one fragile rose made entirely of clear glass, same petal geometry and stem silhouette, changing environment and lighting.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its result URL as --ref for 02. Use 01 and 02 result URLs as --ref for 03 to preserve object identity.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Glass Rose Study
en.description: A three-image continuity series about the same transparent glass rose.

zh-CN.title: 玻璃玫瑰研究
zh-CN.description: 三张图保持同一朵透明玻璃玫瑰，在不同环境中变化。
